full_text:
Lu Kang (Youjie) 陸抗 (幼節)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Lu Kang (陸抗), styledYoujie (幼節). Lu Xun’s second son. Known to be as capable a commander as his father. Lu Kang was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom. Lu Kang lived during the Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
